action.reasoning: Observation: SegFormer-B5 trained for 40 epochs achieved 0.4824 mIoU. Analysis: The model is performing very well. Multi-scale testing with horizontal flips is a standard technique in semantic segmentation that can provide a significant boost (+1.5 to +2.0 mIoU) without any further training. Decision: I will rewrite predict.py to perform multi-scale inference (scales: 0.5, 0.75, 1.0, 1.25, 1.5, 1.75) with horizontal flips. I will submit an evaluation immediately using the existing best checkpoint (epoch_39.pt) to measure the boost. I will also update train.py to support resuming in case we want to train longer in the next iteration.
action.command: echo 'Evaluating multi-scale inference on existing checkpoint'

command_output.stdout: Evaluating multi-scale inference on existing checkpoint
